observations.note: CoT block is well-structured with 4 clear factors and MoSCoW mapping. Additions-only approach preserves existing logic.
Per-phase Read() line ranges accurately match actual examples.md phase boundaries. Progressive loading reduces Phase 1 context by ~74%.

Line 335 in requirements-elicitation-workflow.md changed from 'Prioritize by business value' to 'Prioritize by business value using explicit reasoning:' - technically 1 modification, not pure addition. Semantically equivalent, acceptable.
Test script has 25 well-structured assertions covering all 3 ACs. No skip decorators, no empty tests, no placeholder patterns detected.
SKILL.md has 6 offset-based Read() references (3 in header summary + 3 per-phase). Duplication is intentional for progressive disclosure but creates double maintenance burden.
